<?xml version="1.0"?>
<moleculizer-state>
  <model>
    <units-states>
      <modifications/>
      <mols>
        <mod-mol name="A">
          <weight daltons="100"/>
          <binding-site name="to-B">
            <default-shape-ref name="default"/>
            <site-shape name="default"/>
          </binding-site>
        </mod-mol>
        <mod-mol name="B">
          <weight daltons="100"/>
          <binding-site name="to-A">
            <default-shape-ref name="default"/>
            <site-shape name="default"/>
          </binding-site>
        </mod-mol>
      </mols>
    </units-states>
    <explicit-species-tags>
      <explicit-species-tag name="A-singleton" tag="0x8056838"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="AB" tag="0x8056740"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="B-singleton" tag="0x8051830"/>
    </explicit-species-tags>
    <tagged-species>
      <tagged-plex-species tag="0x8056838">
        <plex>
          <mol-instance name="mod-mol_0">
            <mol-ref name="A"/>
          </mol-instance>
        </plex>
        <instance-states>
          <mod-mol-instance-ref name="mod-mol_0">
            <mod-map/>
          </mod-mol-instance-ref>
        </instance-states>
        <population count="408"/>
        <concentration value="6.77741e-11"/>
        <updated/>
      </tagged-plex-species>
      <tagged-plex-species tag="0x8056740">
        <plex>
          <mol-instance name="mod-mol_0">
            <mol-ref name="A"/>
          </mol-instance>
          <mol-instance name="mod-mol_1">
            <mol-ref name="B"/>
          </mol-instance>
          <binding>
            <mol-instance-ref name="mod-mol_0">
              <binding-site-ref name="to-B"/>
            </mol-instance-ref>
            <mol-instance-ref name="mod-mol_1">
              <binding-site-ref name="to-A"/>
            </mol-instance-ref>
          </binding>
        </plex>
        <instance-states>
          <mod-mol-instance-ref name="mod-mol_0">
            <mod-map/>
          </mod-mol-instance-ref>
          <mod-mol-instance-ref name="mod-mol_1">
            <mod-map/>
          </mod-mol-instance-ref>
        </instance-states>
        <population count="892"/>
        <concentration value="1.48173e-10"/>
        <updated/>
      </tagged-plex-species>
      <tagged-plex-species tag="0x8051830">
        <plex>
          <mol-instance name="mod-mol_0">
            <mol-ref name="B"/>
          </mol-instance>
        </plex>
        <instance-states>
          <mod-mol-instance-ref name="mod-mol_0">
            <mod-map/>
          </mod-mol-instance-ref>
        </instance-states>
        <population count="108"/>
        <concentration value="1.79402e-11"/>
        <updated/>
      </tagged-plex-species>
    </tagged-species>
    <tag-reactions>
      <tag-reaction>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x8056740" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x8051830" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x8056838" multiplicity="1"/>
        <rate value="1"/>
      </tag-reaction>
      <tag-reaction>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x8051830" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x8056838" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x8056740" multiplicity="1"/>
        <rate value="1e+11"/>
      </tag-reaction>
    </tag-reactions>
    <volume liters="1e-11"/>
    <time seconds="1.9"/>
  </model>
  <streams>
    <tagged-species-streams>
      <tagged-species-stream name="A-singleton">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x8056838"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="AB">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x8056740"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="B-singleton">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x8051830"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
    </tagged-species-streams>
    <tagged-dump-streams>
      <tagged-dump-stream file-name="species.dmp" dump-period="0.01">
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="AB"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="A-singleton"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="B-singleton"/>
      </tagged-dump-stream>
    </tagged-dump-streams>
  </streams>
</moleculizer-state>
